kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=searchDropdownBox' by label Electronics.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${product_name} = Boat Bassheads 300C Wired Earphones,Type-C Jack, 10mm Drivers, Signature Sound, in-Line Microphone, Integrated Controls, Voice Assistant & 120cm Cable (Active Black)
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${title} = Boat Bassheads 300C Wired Earphones,Type-C Jack, 10mm Drivers, Signature Sound, in-Line Microphone, Integrated Controls, Voice Assistant & 120cm Cable (Active Black)
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Boat Bassheads 300C Wired Earphones,Type-C Jack, 10mm Drivers, Signature Sound, in-Line Microphone, Integrated Controls, Voice Assistant & 120cm Cable (Active Black)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${cart_product} = Boat Bassheads 300C Wired Earphones,Type-C Jack, 10mm Drivers, Signature Sound, in-Line Microphone, Integrated Co…
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Boat Bassheads 300C Wired Earphones,Type-C Jack, 10mm Drivers, Signature Sound, in-Line Microphone, Integrated Co…'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
